items.finding: G5 export manifest declares validator_decision as 0_kernel/registry/EXPORT_RECOVERY_VALIDATOR_G5_REPAIRED_DECISION_v1.json while marking external_required=true, but the file is not inside the G5 ZIP.
items.risk: Restore code may interpret the path as an internal bundle path and fail to verify the decision.
items.prevention_invariant: Internal-looking relative paths must exist inside the main ZIP. External-only validator decisions must use explicit external artifact locators, sidecar references, and no internal relative path ambiguity.
items.required_fix: G6 must either include the validator decision inside the main ZIP or rewrite manifest validator_policy to an unambiguous external_decision_artifact with governance bundle locator + sidecar binding.

items.finding: CURRENT_WORKING_BASELINE_POINTER last_stage/head still reflects F7-era state instead of G5.
items.risk: Restore or boot may select stale lifecycle state even though ledger and repaired export advanced.
items.prevention_invariant: After a repaired export validates, update the current working pointer to the latest validated stage or explicitly mark it stale/non-authoritative for that lifecycle.
items.required_fix: G6 must update pointer last_stage to G5/G6 or mark pointer lifecycle role explicitly before baseline lock.

items.finding: DAG short IDs such as G5 still lack explicit mapping to ledger full IDs such as G5_REPAIRED_RECOVERY_PROVEN_EXPORT.
items.risk: Programmatic DAG/ledger cross-reference may silently find zero matches.
items.prevention_invariant: Maintain an explicit DAG-to-ledger mapping artifact; never infer short ID equivalence.
items.required_fix: Add STAGE_DAG_LEDGER_ID_MAP_v1.json before or during G6/G7 and require validator use of the mapping.
